_comment: Balanced setup: Claude Sonnet orchestrator, DeepSeek V4 Flash fallback, Kimi K2.6/DeepInfra/local workers. Low paid spend. Based on OpenClaw 2026.4.27 stable.

model._comment: Primary: Sonnet (paid Anthropic API). First fallback: DeepSeek V4 Flash (cheap/fast). Second: Kimi K2.6 via OpenRouter. Third: openrouter/free auto-routes to the best available free model.

compaction._comment: Use DeepSeek V4 Flash for compaction — fast and cheap, no need for frontier quality here.

reasoning._comment: Scorecard Pillar 1 item 7: reasoning OFF on default. Escalate to high explicitly via /model for Coordinator Protocol research/synthesis stages (Part 6). Schema key may vary by OpenClaw version — verify against droplet /status output after deploy.

model._comment: Workers primary: Kimi K2.6 via OpenRouter (budget workhorse). DeepInfra Llama routed through OpenRouter. DeepSeek Flash direct. openrouter/free as catch-all last resort.

cron._comment: Scorecard Pillar 1 item 9: cron output isolated (Part 3, README:647-657). Any cron entry created on the droplet should inherit these defaults — sessionTarget isolated so cron runs don't pile up in the main agent's session history, delivery.mode none so bulk runs don't flood chat. transcriptDir routes cron transcripts off the main memory/ path.

maintenance._comment: Session rotation per README:638. Caps the sessions.json index size so session management stays fast.
